text:
LABEL: 
Provider Bed Type and Count for Facility Active Indicator — January through December 
DESCRIPTION: A flag to indicate the provider’s bed type information specified in the unique combination of bed type 
variables (BED_TYPE_CD and BED_CNT) was active in the given month. Each of 12 months.
SHORT NAME: PRVDR_BED_ACTV_IND_01 
PRVDR_BED_ACTV_IND_02 
PRVDR_BED_ACTV_IND_03 
PRVDR_BED_ACTV_IND_04 
PRVDR_BED_ACTV_IND_05 
PRVDR_BED_ACTV_IND_06 
PRVDR_BED_ACTV_IND_07 
PRVDR_BED_ACTV_IND_08
